arts.ttl: Fiorentina and Inter to remain in the chase
arts.sum: Fiorentina have won only one of their 14 meetings with Inter in Serie A since the 2017-18 season (D5 L8); meanwhile Viola have failed to score in their last two league games against the Nerazzurri but haven’t recorded a longer run of consecutive goalless matches in the competition against them since doing so between December 2007 and November 2009 (5 in a row). Inter have won six of their last eight matches against Fiorentina in Serie A (D1 L1) and since the beginning of the 2020-21 season no team has beaten the Viola more times in the top-flight (Milan also six).

arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi: ‘Fiorentina are a tough opponent – We have injuries but we will manage’
arts.sum: Ahead of the Serie A clash between Fiorentina and Inter Milan, head coach Simone Inzaghi spoke to Inter TV about the challenges his team will face against a formidable opponent. Fiorentina comes into the match riding a wave of seven consecutive victories, making them a significant threat. “It will be a very difficult match, and much depends on our approach. We know they are coming off seven straight wins, so we are definitely up against a challenging opponent,” Inzaghi stated. arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Inter: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: A thrilling clash awaits as high-flying Fiorentina host reigning champions Inter Milan at the Stadio Artemio Franchi on Sunday evening. Both teams enter the match in scintillating form, setting the stage for a potentially season-defining encounter. Fiorentina have been the surprise package of the Serie A season, currently sitting in 4th place with an impressive 28 points from 13 matches. Under the astute guidance of Raffaele Palladino, the Viola have transformed into a formidable unit, demonstrating both tactical discipline and attacking flair. The Tuscan club is riding an extraordinary wave of success, having won their last seven league matches consecutively.
